entry.title: Is there any pre-requisites for enabling Skill based job recommendations, AI assisted skill matching
entry.content:
Is there any pre-requisite for enabling Skill based job recommendations, AI assisted skill matching for applicant screening delivered in 2H 2024 for Recruitment.

Assisted skills matching is now available to candidates as part of the job search experience

New actions and capabilities within the AI - Assisted Skills Matching

entry.title: Active Metrics in Alerting Directory Browser not having any data in EC2 MAI Support Servlet
entry.content:
Hi,

We are receiving very limited metrics ( mostly availability) when we check E2E PERSON_NAME Support Servlet ( Show Collection Statistics).

When we checked using 'Active Metrics in Alerting Directory Browser' (MAI_TOOLS) those are active. Even Systems Monitoring showing data for it. 

But same data is not visible in E2E Support Servlet.

What should be done to get data for those metrics?

Also

Is there any way to get the metrics with PULL_RFC collector?

Can we use any out of the box way/function/transaction to get these metrics?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Active Metrics in Alerting Directory Browser not havi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer

Support Servlet will show only metrics from collectors of type PUSH_GENERIC for this reason not all metrics you see in Directory Browser will be shown.

It is not possible to change the data collector for all metrics to PUSH_GENERIC, as certain metrics are designed to work with specific data collectors. Changing the data collector would cause gray metrics.

The Support Servlet works only with PUSH_GENERIC metrics.

Please see: E2E MAI Support Servlet

See also: 2355191 - How to use "E2E MAI Support Servlet" in tx MAI_Tools for Technical Monitoring troubleshooting 

To to get the metrics with PULL_RFC collector please check the KBA: 2016768 - Data Provider Check for PULL_RFC Metrics using transaction MAI_Tools

entry.title: Where in software download centre the SAP Cloud Application Studio is located in the menu structure
entry.content:
Within the below structure where can I find SAP cloud application studio?  (I am not asking from the search bar I am asking from the below structure).  Thanks,

 https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter

entry.title: Re: Undeploy or Delete OPC UA Server (shop floor system)
entry.content: This solved my issue. Thank you very much!

entry.title: SFTP Error: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" after SP28 installed
entry.content:
Hi,

We had recently updgraded SAP PO system to SP28. For one of the SFTP receiver channel, I am receving the following error:

"Message could not be forwarded to the JCA adapter. Reason: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" 

I had already verified the SAP Note: 3406752 and applied the following Additional parameter in the SFTP Receiver Channel -> Advanced mode

customPreferredAuthentication  = "password"

But still the error remains same.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: After the work center sets the advanced plan ID, clic...
entry.content:
I had the same error!

How did you solve?

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone | Server IP address could not found
entry.content: Probably wrong configuration in your runtime destination, can you share the details of the destination config?

entry.title: Create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template
entry.content:
Now I can create only one order in IW31 tcode. 
Need to create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create multiple orders in IW31 based on a template
entry.content: IW31 is limited to one order at a time. You could consider using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN to develop a utility to create multiple orders from a template.

entry.title: in pld needto use the formula field to not to round result of colsum("F_002")
entry.content:
hi to all

Im using a field formula type in PLD to print in an inboice but the field round up it results i need it to not tu round it to any neither up nor down end the formula i used amount(colsum("F_002"))

thanks

entry.title: Re: Expose Fiori Launchpad to public internet only specif...
entry.content: You can restrict access in ias/cis with restricted access configuration. Users in cis with certain usergroups can access it or even by ip range. Would this be helpful?

entry.title: How can external LMS users access the system if you have not migrated to IAS?
entry.content:
Hello, we will not be able to complete the IAS migration in time for the 2H 2024 release, which means our External LMS users who currently login with the Native Learning Sign in will no longer be able to access the LMS. Does anyone have a workaround we can use until we've completed the IAS migration?

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/learning-integrated-external-user-migration-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/146684

Thank you, Jennifer

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit Error
entry.content: Thanks Vincent, but we already made this configuration previously but still we have the error.

entry.title: Re: Show more than one currency in the same planning view
entry.content:
Hi,

If a key figure has base planning level with currency dimension for e.g., WKPRODLOCCURR, add exchange rate conversion WKPRODLOCCURRCURRTO. Refer any standard key figure which has currency conversion modeled. Pull attribute currency to or currency to description in the planning view. Make sure exchange rates are maintained for both currencies. Please post if it works.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Upgrading Oracle 1to 9c
entry.content:
Are you executing the upgrade according to the SAP note "2800001 - Upgrading to Oracle Database 19c (DBUA)"?

Also, did you applied the most recent SAP bundle (ORACLE patches) before starting the DB upgrade?

entry.title: Image generate from Smartforms with error display
entry.content: I have this pdf file generated using a smartform and sent to a folder in sharepoint, when downloading this same local form it does not disfigure the image, but when sending it to sharepoint it looks like the images below, Can someone explain to me why this happens?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2024
entry.content:
Dear Andreas

Thanks for your support and feedback on this topic.

Regards
Arunkumar AS

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Mobile App login issues
entry.content: Hello, is there a recent article addressing this issue?

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP enabale Now 2406 start ManagerSEN failled
entry.content:
Hi Issouf,
if you are stuck with the message Fail - Application at context path {/warName] could not be started, check your JRE Version.
A customer of ours had the same issue, and updating the SAP Machine to Version 17 solved the issue.

Official KBA 3349083 - SAP Enable Now Manager HANA on-premise Tomcat compatibility - SAP for Me

BR
Kurt

entry.title: Oportunidades!! Capacitação ABAP FIORI e FUNCIONAL SD
entry.content:
Pessoal hoje quero compartilhar essa BIG oportunidade de uma consultoria aqui cidade. Eu comecei no mundo SAP por meio de uma capacitação similar oferecida gratuitamente como essa, pela antiga Pelissari. Sou muito grata e por isso apoio iniciativas como essa. Parabéns Escotta pela iniciativa. 
Então se você te interesse, essa é a sua oportunidade de se desenvolver e ingressar no universo SAP.

Inscreva-se no link abaixo e junte-se à próxima turma de capacitação!
INCRIÇÕES AQUI Até dia 16/10/24.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Hana - Zero Downtime Option
entry.content: Let's connect and stay tuned for more blogs: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abhishek-kumar01

entry.title: User status - business transaction RMWQ and RMWA
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with the user status of the production order.

My customer requested that when we GR the production order (DLV status) with PP, QM module, we cannot withdraw any more components and confirm the operation.

I have set the user status. It works, blocking the step confirmation. However, it cannot block the material consumption. I have set the prohibited business transaction "Goods Movement", which means blocking the "GI for production order". But when set like that, the system blocks the Quantity posted transaction (mvt 321) when we have the UD code.

Please suggest how to implement this.

Regards,

Jack

entry.title: Is it possible to remove a material extension from a distribution chain?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a scenario where we've extended a material to a distribution chain (ie 1710 10).  However, we have since decided to use common distribution channels and divisions, and have assigned them in customizing as such.  So we've also extended this material to the common one (ie 1710 00), which we will be using going forward.  However, since the distribution chain 1710 10 is no longer valid, whenever I try to edit this product in the application Manage Product Master Data it keeps giving me an error saying that I've maintained an invalid sales area, and I'm unable to save any changes at all.  I've tried setting the deletion indicator at the distribution chain layer, and it's still hitting me with this error.  Can anything be done to remove this extension so it stops giving me a hard error?   

Thanks

entry.title: Is Single Tenancy for LLMs Available in SAP GenAI Hub or Planned for Future Releases?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
 
I’m exploring options for integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) within our SAP landscape, specifically through the SAP GenAI Hub. One of our key requirements is ensuring single tenancy, where the LLMs are dedicated exclusively to our organization, and no infrastructure or data is shared with other clients.
 
I haven’t come across explicit details on whether single tenancy is a feature currently offered by the SAP GenAI Hub for LLMs, or if this is something SAP plans to support in future releases.
 
Can anyone clarify:
 
1. Is single tenancy for LLMs available on the SAP GenAI Hub?
2. If not, are there any plans in SAP’s roadmap to introduce this feature, particularly for customers with strict data privacy and isolation requirements?
3. Are there recommended alternative approaches to achieve single-tenancy or similar levels of isolation if this feature is not currently available?
 
Thanks in advance for your insights!

entry.title: Re: Custom Alert for different periods
entry.content:
Hi Mariia,

This is not possible. You can offset key figure values in past by a year (for e.g., Actuals Qty Prior Year) and then compare this key figure instead in the alert condition.

Regards,

Piyush

entry.title: Pre-edited approval table.
entry.content: Would you like to know if there is a table that stores the documents with record of release and approval of pre-edited documents (FBV0)?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now users becoming inactive
entry.content: Check if the automatic user deactivation is turned on in the Server Settings.

entry.title: Re: Can we change the cursor to hand cursor in SAP Enable...
entry.content: By drawing it in the m.svg file that is a part of the trainer style resource

entry.title: Re: The `punycode` module is deprecated. Please use a use...
entry.content: ANy solution for this yet? I have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting: Data Volume – What you need to consider to keep the dat
entry.content: Is there any note published for 2023 version? This one mentioned is now outdated.

entry.title: Re: Can you change the highlights style to static highlig...
entry.content: Yes, you can

entry.title: Extract KNA1 General Customer Master Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
ABAP PROGRAM(S) - CUSTOMER 

ABAP Program Name - Z_KNA1_CUSTOMER 

  • Program Type - ABAP 
  • ABAP Program Name - Z_KNA1_CUSTOMER 
  • TCODE – Z_KNA1_CUST
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- KNA1.CSV 
  • Output File Type – CSV (Column with Semicolons Separator (;) ) 
  • SAP Table Name – KNA1 & KNB1 
  • List Of Fields to Be Extracted - 
  • KUNNR 
  • MANDT 
  • LAND1 
  • MCOD1 
  • NAME1 
  • NAME2 
  • NAME3 
  • STRAS 
  • ORT01 
  • PSTLZ 
  • SPRAS 
  • LZONE 
  • KTOKD 

---------------Program Start From Below-----------------------------

REPORT Z_KNA1_CUSTOMER.
TYPE-POOLS: VRM.

DATA: NAME TYPE VRM_ID,
LIST TYPE VRM_VALUES,
VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.


PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\ServerName\tmp\KNA1.csv'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

NAME = 'ENTITY'.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.START-OF-SELECTION.

type-pools:TRUXS.
data: begin of itab occurs 0,
KUNNR like KNA1-KUNNR,
MANDT like KNA1-MANDT,
LAND1 like KNA1-LAND1,
MCOD1 like KNA1-MCOD1,
NAME1 like KNA1-NAME1,
NAME2 like KNA1-NAME2,
NAME3 like KNA1-NAME3,
STRAS like KNA1-STRAS,
ORT01 like KNA1-ORT01,
PSTLZ like KNA1-PSTLZ,
SPRAS like KNA1-SPRAS,
LZONE like KNA1-LZONE,
KTOKD like KNA1-KTOKD,
BUKRS like KNB1-BUKRS,
end of itab.

data: itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
SELECT KNA1~KUNNR
KNA1~MANDT
KNA1~LAND1
KNA1~MCOD1
KNA1~NAME1
KNA1~NAME2
KNA1~NAME3
KNA1~STRAS
KNA1~ORT01
KNA1~PSTLZ
KNA1~SPRAS
KNA1~LZONE
KNA1~KTOKD
KNB1~BUKRS
from KNA1 INNER JOIN KNB1 ON KNA1~KUNNR = KNB1~KUNNR
into table itab
WHERE KNB1~BUKRS = ENTITY.

CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
EXPORTING
I_FIELD_SEPERATOR = ','
TABLES
I_TAB_SAP_DATA = itab
CHANGING
I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
CONVERSION_FAILED = 1
OTHERS = 2
.
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = OPATH
TABLES
data_tab = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
OTHERS = 1.

entry.title: How to update custom workflow scenario id in standard Fiori apps manifest file?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently, a standard Fiori app Credit Memo Request is having hardcoded scenario id in its manifest file in below path:

embeddedcomponents>workflowcomponents>settings>scenarioid

How to update the custom workflow scenarioid in standard apps manifest?

Current Approach,

I have extended app using Adaptation Project and created new section for Approval Details. I have used component usage : sap.io.bpm.sworkfloweditor.lib.reuse.stworkflowinstance. With this I am able to show table but its not showing any data. Also, I have checked in network tab, its not sending any requests.

entry.title: Re: Error Create Table Persistence and Generate Data
entry.content:
Hello Victor,

you must use ZTRAVEL_APP_VKT instead of ZTRAVEL_VKT after define table. Both the object name and the name in the source code must be the same.

entry.title: Re: Plant "phased" roll out of SAP S4/HANA for Product Co...
entry.content:
Hello

sorry to say.. this is not possible.... The activation of PC (Product Compliance) (and therefore move from EHS Classic to PC) can only be done by "process" (and not by plant, company code or whatever similar criteria)

C.B.

PS: Best knowlegde on my side: something like you would like to get is not on the roadmap of SAP and from my point of view will not come to the Roadmap of PC solution

PPS: honestly: this question you could ask SAP:

What i could imagine which might work (but please ask SAP): you have one S/4 HANA system: You have two clients. In Client X you use EHS Classic and in Client Y PC; but if this help... no idea

entry.title: Extract KNB1 Customer Master (Company CodE) Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
ABAP Program - Z_KNB1_CUSTOMER

  • Program Type - ABAP 
  • ABAP Program Name - Z_KNB1_CUST 
  • Tcode - ZHM_KNB1_C  
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- KNB1.CSV 
  • Output File Type – CSV (Column with Semicolons Separator (;)) 
  • SAP Table Name - KNB1 
  • List Of Fields to Be Extracted -  
  • KUNNR 
  • ZWELS 
  • ZTERM 

--------ABAP CODE START FROM HERE-----------

REPORT Z_KNB1_CUSTOMER.


TYPE-POOLS: VRM.

DATA: NAME TYPE VRM_ID,
LIST TYPE VRM_VALUES,
VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.


PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\SERVERNAME\tmp\Uae\KNB1.csv'.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

NAME = 'ENTITY'.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.

CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.

START-OF-SELECTION.

type-pools:TRUXS.
data: begin of itab occurs 0,
kunnr like knb1-kunnr,
zwels like knb1-zwels,
zterm like knb1-zterm,
BUKRS like knb1-BUKRS,
end of itab.
data: itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
select KNB1~kunnr
KNB1~zwels
KNB1~zterm
KNB1~BUKRS
FROM KNB1
into table itab
WHERE KNB1~BUKRS = ENTITY.

CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
EXPORTING
I_FIELD_SEPERATOR = ','
TABLES
I_TAB_SAP_DATA = itab
CHANGING
I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
CONVERSION_FAILED = 1
OTHERS = 2
.
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = OPATH
TABLES
data_tab = itab1
EXCEPTIONS
OTHERS = 1.

entry.title: Re: The `punycode` module is deprecated. Please use a use...
entry.content:
For me only this error was shown:

Command run failed with error : spawn EINVAL

I solved it by using "npm update" in the console, afterwards the preview worked for me.

entry.title: Add action button on Custom Business Object exposed as service on BAS on which BAPI is called
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Currently we are on S4HANA 2020 on premise. We have a requirement where we need to use Custom Business Object ( CBO ) which will be exposed as a service and config on BAS. 

We will be doing with all CRUD operation on the above application build from CBO and also had to trigger a BAPI call to create Sales Order on one action button. 

Please suggest how I can add the BAPI functionality here on Action button. Secondly, how we can add action button on UI build through CBO.

Best Regards

entry.title: Integrate external users to SF LMS
entry.content:
I wanted to see if anyone has integrated external users (non payroll who don’t feed over from SAP on an import file) such as agency temps, contractors to SF LMS.

We currently have them complete safety/compliance trainings through an external site but we would like to integrate them in SF LMS so they are auto-assigned trainings.

I know this can be done with IAS import and this will exclude them from SF platform but wanted to see if I can pick some brains on how others may be managing the process who use SAP HR to house all employees.

Lastly, if external users are in LMS, do managers see their assigned trainings or show up in LMS reporting for learning needs?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Oportunidades!! Capacitação ABAP FIORI e FUNCIONAL SD
entry.content: Quanto mais Parceiras SAP investirem em capacitação, melhor será.

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – Advanced Shipping & Receiving - Immediate Loading
entry.content:
In this blog post, I will explain how to configure Immediate Loading functionality in Advanced Shipping & Receiving, in addition to demonstrating the process steps for testing the happy flow scenario without freight unit or delivery split.

For Scenario 2 - Partial loading with freight unit / delivery split in TM and EWM, please check the follow-up blog post - Immediate Loading with Delivery Split.

Background Information:

With Immediate Loading functionality in ASR (SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02), loading of single handling units is now allowed, even if not all items/HUs of an Outbound Delivery Order are fully picked, packed or staged, which improves the following:

  • Decrease total lead time
  • Avoids overcrowded goods issue zones
  • Allows a more flexible start of loading

Prerequisites:

NOTE: Advanced Shipping and Receiving should be configured for TM-EWM integration, for detailed steps on how to configure ASR scenario, please check SAP Note 3512117 - Advanced Shipping and Receiving - Cookbook.

Configuration Steps:

1- Create new Packaging Material Type (optional)
SPRO->Extended Warehouse Management->Cross-Process Settings->Handling Units->Basics->Define Packaging Material Types for Warehousing.


Figure 01 - Packaging Material Type

2- Assign Number Range to new Packaging Material Type (optional)
SPRO->Extended Warehouse Management->Cross-Process Settings->Handling Units->Basics->External Identification->Assign Number Range Intervals to Packaging Material Types.


Figure 02 - Assign NR to Packaging Material Type

3- Define new Packaging Material Type in ERP (optional)
SPRO->Logistics General->Handling Unit Management->Basics->Technical Basics->Define Packaging Material Types for Shipping.


Figure 03 - Define ERP Packaging Material Type

4- Specify how ''Packed for Shipping'' status should be updated for Packaging Material Type
SPRO->Extended Warehouse Management->Cross-Process Settings->Handling Units->Basics->Set HU to "Packed for Shipping".


Figure 04 - Define how Packing for Shipping status is updated

NOTE: ''Packed for Shipping - SPSH'' is header status on HU level.
You can configure this status to be updated either manually or automatically by setting one of the following options:  
- Manually: In this case, you set the status manually in Work Center: Packing - General or in the inbound process Package-Based Shipping from Production.
- At Picking: The status is set when the handling unit is assigned to an outbound delivery after the picking warehouse task has been confirmed.
- After Packing: The status is set when packing is complete in process-oriented storage control.
- At Staging: The status is set when the handling unit arrives at a staging area.

This status can also be set automatically if some other conditions are fulfilled, for more information please check: Packed for Shipping | SAP Help Portal

5- Set Up Access Sequence for Immediate Loading
Easy Access->Extended Warehouse Management->Settings->Advanced Shipping and Receiving->Set Up Access Sequence for Immediate Loading.


Figure 05 - Define ASR Immediate Loading relevance

6- Define ASR Immediate Loading relevance
Easy Access->Extended Warehouse Management->Settings->Advanced Shipping and Receiving->Configure Immediate Loading.


Figure 06 - Define ASR Immediate Loading relevance

7- Assign new Pacakging Material to a Packaging Material
Easy Access->Change Material (MM02)


Figure 07 - Create new Packaing Material

Testing Scenario and Steps:

NOTE: The following testing scenario has been executed on SAP S/4HANA OP2023 FPS02 with embedded EWM and TM solutions.

Scenario #1: Happy Flow scenario without Delivery Split:
In this scenario we will pick entire product quantity planned in outbound delivery order, then we do packing and setting of ''Packed for Shipping'' status manually for one HU out of 2 HUs and then we start loading of one HU without completing packing or setting the status for other planned HU in the outbound delivery order.

1.1- Create Outbound Delivery in Logistics Execution (Tx. VL01NO)


Figure 08 - Create outbound delivery without reference in LE

1.2- Create Picking Warehouse Tasks (Tx. /SCWM/PRDO)


Figure 09 - Create Picking WTs

1.3- Confirm Picking Warehouse Tasks (Tx. /SCWM/MON)


Figure 10 - Confirm Picking WTs

1.4- Pack Products into Shipping Handling Units  (Tx. /SCWM/PACK)


Figure 11 - Pack Products into SHUs

1.5- Set 'Packed for Shipping' status for one HU (Tx. /SCWM/MON)


Figure 12 - Set 'Packed for Shipping' status

Handling Units information will be communicated to Freight Order after setting Packed for Shipping status on HU in EWM.

1.6- Create Freight Order  (App. Create Road Freight Order)
1. Assign Outbound Delivery to Freight Order: Iterms -> Insert->Insert FUs Based on Base Document ID
2. Assign Carrier: Business Partner->Add Carrier 
3. Update Transportation Status: Execution Status->Set Ready for Transportation Status


Figure 13 - Create Freight Order

1.7- Loading first Handling Unit (App. Load or Unload Freight Order)
Execution Status->Set Items to Loaded


Figure 14 - Loading one HU

With the new HU header status (packing for shipping) now it's possible to start loading as soon as one HU is ready, although rest of HUs are not packed/ready yet.

1.8- Pack and Set Shipping Status for second HU (Tx. /SCWM/PACK)


Figure 15 - Packing second HU

1.9- Loading second HU (Tx. /SCWM/RFUI)
Outbound Proceses->Loading->Loading by HU


Figure 16 - Loading second HU

1.10- Set 'Ready for Shipping' Status on ODO Level (Tx. /SCWM/PRDO)


Figure 17 - Set to Ready for Shipping on ODO level

1.11- Check LE Outbound Delivery (Tx. VL03N)


Figure 18 - Check LE Outbound Delivery after update

Handling Units information will be communicated to LE outbound delivery after setting Ready for Shipping status on ODO level in EWM.

1.12- Post Goods Issue in EWM (Tx. /SCWM/PRDO)


Figure 19 - Post Goods Issue in EWM

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Conclusion:

Immediate Loading is a new feature of Advanced Shipping and Receiving that further optimises the outbound process and gives warehouses more flexibility during performing loading activities, especially in a delivery split scenario that automatically triggers the split of the freight unit and outbound delivery order in EWM and TM respectively.

In this blog post, I have tried to execute the process steps using a mix of different GUI transactions and Fiori applications to show the different options available during executing each step. Also, this blog focused on a warehouse driven scenario. However, immediate loading functionality is also supported in a transport-driven scenario.

For Scenario 2 - Partial Loading with freight unit / delivery split, please check the follow-up blog post - Immediate Loading with Delivery Split.

For more information about Immediate Loading feature, please check Immediate Loading | SAP Help Portal.

For more information about other new EWM features in S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, please check the following blog post by Florian Kuchta: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Extended Warehouse Management Private Edition 2023 FPS02– What’s New.
 
Learn more about SAP Premium Engagement and how a global team of experts can help you to get the most out of your SAP solutions.

If you already are a Premium Engagement customer, contact your Technical Quality Manager (TQM) to discuss how Premium Engagement services can help you with a custom-tailored and efficient service portfolio to make your project a success!

#CoE EMEA SCM1

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – Immediate Loading with Delivery Split
entry.content:
In this blog post, I will demonstrate the process steps required to run immediate loading with freight unit and delivery split in TM and EWM respectively.

Prerequisites:

Please make sure to check blog post - Advanced Shipping & Receiving - Immediate Loading, for Immediate Loading overview, configuration steps, and testing Scenario 1 - happy flow scenario without freight unit / delivery split.

Testing Scenario and Steps:

NOTE: The following testing scenario has been executed on SAP S/4HANA OP2023 FPS02 with embedded EWM and TM solutions.

Scenario #2: Partial Loading with Delivery Split:
In this scenario we will pick and pack all items in outbound delivery order, then will set ''Packed for Shipping'' status for only one Handling Unit manually, then loading completion can be set on Freight Order level in order to trigger delivery/FU split.

2.1- Create Outbound Delivery in Logistics Execution (Tx. VL01NO)


Figure 20 - Create outbound delivery without reference in LE

2.2- Create Picking Warehouse Tasks (Tx. /SCWM/MON)


Figure 21 - Create Picking WTs

2.3- Confirm Picking Warehouse Tasks (Tx. /SCWM/RFUI)
Outbound Proceses->Picking->Picking by WO

 >  > >> 
Figure 22 - Confirm Picking WTs

2.4- Set 'Packed for Shipping' status for one HU (Tx. /SCWM/MON)


Figure 23 - Set 'Packed for Shipping' status

2.5- Create Freight Order (App. Create Road Freight Order)
1. Assign Outbound Delivery to Freight Order: Iterms -> Insert->Insert FUs Based on Base Document ID
2. Assign Carrier: Business Partner->Add Carrier 
3. Update Transportation Status: Execution Status->Set Ready for Transportation Status


Figure 24 - Create Freight Order

2.6- Loading one Handling Unit (App. Load or Unload Freight Order)
Execution Status->Set Items to Loaded


Figure 25 - Loading one HU

2.7- Set Loading Completion (App. Load or Unload Freight Order)
Execution Status->Set Stop to Loading Completed


Figure 26 - Set loading Completion

This is the trigger of FU and ODO split, so before you execute this step please make sure that you don't have open warehouse tasks for ODO which is part of the FO, otherwise error messages will appear and split won't be possible.

2.8- Check Original Outbound Delivery Order (Tx. /SCWM/PRDO)
Items->Document Flow


Figure 27 - Check Original ODO

Original ODO quantity has been reduced by the quantity not loaded and a new split ODO has been created with remaing quantity and HU.

2.9- Check New Split Outbound Delivery Order (Tx. /SCWM/PRDO)


Figure 28 - Check New Split ODO

Picking and Packing statuses are updated in the new ODO with the same HU which is not loaded, additionally there is new split LE outbound delivery created of course with same quantity but without HU information as Ready for Shipping status is not set yet.

2.10- Check New Split Freight Unit (App. Delivery Integration - Worklist)
Planning Status = 01 (Not Planned)


Figure 29 - Check New Split FU

2.11- Set 'Ready for Shipping' Status in Original Outbound Delivery Order (Tx. /SCWM/MON)


Figure 30 - Set to Ready for Shipping on Original ODO

2.12- Check LE Outbound Delivery (Tx. VL03N)


Figure 31 - Check original LE Outbound Delivery after status update

Handling Units information will be communicated to LE outbound delivery after setting Ready for Shipping status on ODO level in EWM.

2.13- Post Goods Issue (App. Load or Unload Freight Order)
Goods Movement->Post


Figure 32 - Post Goods Issue

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Conclusion:

Immediate Loading is a new feature of Advanced Shipping and Receiving that further optimises the outbound process and gives warehouses more flexibility during performing loading activities, especially in a delivery split scenario that automatically triggers the split of the freight unit and outbound delivery order in EWM and TM respectively.

In this blog post, I have tried to execute the process steps using a mix of different GUI transactions and Fiori applications to show the different options available during executing each step. Also, this blog focused on a warehouse driven scenario. However, immediate loading functionality is also supported in a transport-driven scenario.

Please make sure to check blog post - Advanced Shipping & Receiving - Immediate Loading, for Immediate Loading overview, configuration steps, and testing Scenario 1 - happy flow scenario without freight unit / delivery split.

For more information about other delivery split scenarios in ASR, please check Delivery Split for Outbound Delivery Orders in Advanced Shipping and Receiving | SAP Help Portal.

 
Learn more about SAP Premium Engagement and how a global team of experts can help you to get the most out of your SAP solutions.

If you already are a Premium Engagement customer, contact your Technical Quality Manager (TQM) to discuss how Premium Engagement services can help you with a custom-tailored and efficient service portfolio to make your project a success!

#CoE EMEA SCM1

entry.title: Re: Sales BOM
entry.content:
Hi Manish,

Please look through the scope item 31Q. This lists other options other than ERLA and LUMF. It is mentioned under https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/5d66b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html as well. 

CPFH has pricing at header but the inventory is at item level.

It SSCUI (102807) is the "Assign Item categories" configuration node. However, we have locked it to provide assignment for few item category group and sales order types. I would still recommend looking through standard options in 31Q.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Nadchodzące spotkania SAP Community – wrzesień/październik 2024

entry.title: Re: Editable DataTable Issue on List Picker
entry.content: When the Data Table is in edit mode the Data Table OnPress does not apply.  It only applies when the table is not editable.  That is an expected behavior.

entry.title: Re: Initiatives in SuccessFactors Goals Management
entry.content: @SachinPachauri following up on Petya1's question - can initiative information be pulled in a report? So far I haven't been able to find it. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Solution Process app dwonload best practices
entry.content:
Hi.


It seems that there is currently no direct download option available in the ‘Solution Process’ app of Cloud ALM for scope items (best practices). However, it might be possible to retrieve the required data through the API. Which specific information would you like to have in the Excel file? If we know more about the data you’re looking for, we can explore whether the API is a suitable solution and help you extract the data.

Kind regards

Thomas

Did you found a way to do this?

Regards

entry.title: Unable to get values in ABAP CDS -Vendor withholding tax amount (BSAK-SKFBT, BSEG-QSSHB)
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to get the vendor withholding Tax base amount for vendors and need to report by vendor, with Ac doc #, correspodning clearing doc# etc. When I build a query/sql in the SQL COnsole I am able to get the values exactly matching to the SAP Screen data form BSAK-SKFBT or BSEG-QSSHB fields. But when I build as a ABAP CDS view these fields are not accesible or available for the CDS View output. 

I understand BSAK, BSIK, BSEG and KPF are all views in S4 HANA. Any otehr options or tables that I can use to derive the data?

Thanks for your help in advance.

Arthur.

entry.title: Purchasing Rebates Condition Contract/Settlement Setup Question.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can you please help with a scenario that I am trying to setup with condition contract.

1% rebate for $1000 USD

2% rebates for $2000 USD

3% rebates for $3000 USD. 

Example : if the purchase was $1050, then we should receive rebates as 1% for $1000 ($10) and 2% for $50($1). So a total rebate of $51.

I have looked at different scale types but nothing seems to work. Any guidance is great appreciated.

Thank you,

Ria.

entry.title: Payment Terms with PROX + Days
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I need your help to configure the payment terms:

1% 3rd PROX + 30 Net EOM
3rd Prox = 10/3
+30 = 11/3 (discount date)
EOM = 11/30 (net date)

entry.title: Work Center Hierarchy for use in CM04
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have run into an issue where I've created a work center hierarchy to be used to display the capacity inside CM04 for numerous work centers. 

I created the hierarchy in CR21. Also, I added the hierarchy configuration to the Options profile that CM04 uses (SAPB012)   

SAPB012 - Configuration

CM04 General Settings 

Once I verified the General Settings, I go to the selection screen of CM04 and run the transaction. What happens after that is CM04 disregards that I have a work center hierarchy included and displays all of the work center data for plant 0030 only. That is because the work center field in the selection screen is left blank. My thinking is that shouldn't matter and CM04 should only give an output for the work center's included in my hierarchy. Any help would be greatly appreciated, thank you!

entry.title: ISU FICA Loan Edit Functionality
entry.content:
Hello SAP ISU Experts,

I am trying to implement SAP FICA Loans functionality for my IS-U client. They have requirement to create loans with Interest. I wanted to check how we can edit/adjust the Interest amount or apply advance payment to the principal there by adjusting the interest. When I try to edit the loans using EK26 transaction, I see the options but they are all greyed out. Can you please help me understand how to achieve the requirements or activate the below greyed out options.

thanks and Regards

Preeti Choudhary

entry.title: Re: Cost Relevant when using non-valuated project stock and preliminary requisition for WBS
entry.content: Hi Krishna, hope you´re ok. Did you ever got an answer or a tip about this issue?

entry.title: Re: PaPM Cloud: How to calling HANA stored procedure insi...
entry.content:
No 😅 I tried also to open an incident and the response wans't good.

Here the extract

 

I understand the issue you're encountering while establishing connection to SAP HANA using Python RFA in PaPM. 

 

Upon investigating, we found that the connection that you are trying to establish fails. We would like to highlight that pandas.connect() is not a supported API according to the official documentation of pandas library. Furthermore, there is no alternate approach of connecting to HANA database which is currently supported in Python RFA and this is by design to avoid security issues.

 

As an alternative, you can retrieve data using the method data = scope.get('data', []). Please have a look at https://blogs.sap.com/2023/12/28/using-the-python-rfa-function-in-papm-to-calculate-the-difference-between-two-dates/ to get a detailed example showcasing the same.

 

If anyone had a positive experience, please tell us 😅

entry.title: Re: GL Accounts Balance App
entry.content: I too am facing the same issue wrt getting the previous period's balance. If the report is run for a specific postingFrom and postingTo date for a specific year, how do u get the balance brought forward from the previous year ? This is always a requirement from business, im surprised its not readily available via I_GLAcctBalanceCube, unless we looking at the wrong CDS View ?

entry.title: ORDER - PM NOTIFICATION INTEGRATION
entry.content:
I enabled, via SPRO, the integration between ORDER and PM NOTIFICATION. Now every type X order, when created, generates a type M notification. With this interaction active, in IW31, I noticed new fields (which will be used to populate the future notification); however, I don't have the code group and code field for the object part.

Do you know if it's possible, in a standard way, for IW31 to also include the object part fields for me to fill in?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to merge archived PDF files in One file?
entry.content:
Hi,

If you have the outputs as spool you can convert it into PDF using function module RSPO_RETURN_SPOOLJOB. If you append multiple spools to this and it will combine into single PDF document.

I have used this to send the PDF as e-mail attachment using CLASS CL_DOCUMENT_BCS.

Thanks,

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Rebates Condition Contract/Settlement Setu...
entry.content:
Hello Ria, 

graduated scales are not supported in Settlement Management. You have to develop your own pricing routine.

 2598234 - Graduate Scales are not supported for settlement dicuments 

 2678613 - Using Graduated-to interval scales in Condition Contracts 

Regards,

Thorsten

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof .

Thanks for this wonderful blog.. I have a small query..in Timesheet.

Can we create Time Pay Time for Total Paid Hours & Total Unpaid Hours ?

For Example :

Total Paid Hours:-Regular Working Hour + Paid Leave Hours ) .

Total Unpaid Hours :-Which includes If Employee is in Unpaid Abseces.

Thanks & Regards 

Baldeba

entry.title: Re: Expose Fiori Launchpad to public internet only specif...
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I found a note 2801674(Fiori : Is it possible to restrict access to applications based on Network location (internal vs internal)) related to the issue, does this mean that it's not really possible? Based on resolution note : There is no standard/built-in method for achieving this restriction, as the only controls available for limiting access to applications are via PFCG roles (which control Catalogs/Groups assignment), and the device type restrictions (desktop/phone/tablet) available on Target Mappings in the Launchpad Designer (transaction /UI2/FLPD_CUST). Please check KBA 2469897 for instructions on submitting a feature request for this feature. Does this mean that it's really not possible and we should request for feature? Your advice would be very appreciated

entry.title: Re: Expose Fiori Launchpad to public internet only specif...
entry.content: Does this note 2801674 say that it really is not possible to do it?

entry.title: How to we manage hiring temporary or contract new hire on right to return permanent position
entry.content:
Hi .

Business wants to hire temporary or contract employee on RTR permanent position . Position number will remain same but new hired employee will work as temp or contract nature. Higher duty wont work in our case.

They do not want to create temporary position.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Number of Days from Creation for Lead to change Status
entry.content: Hello Daniel, how is it possible to insert it in a report?

entry.title: Re: Find which PFCG role contains a specific SAP Fiori Ti...
entry.content:
To find the PFCG role for an App ID need to follow the below Steps

1) Open Fiori Content Manager - Tcode /UI2/FLPCM_CUST

2) Entering the SAP Fiori ID that you find in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library into the search field on the Tile/Target Mappings tab. You will immediately get a list of all tiles and target mappings that launch the SAP Fiori application. 

3) Double Click on the Target mapping, so that the system will show the Catalogue ID in a FLPCM lower screen

4) Note down the Catalogue ID

5) Open Transaction SUIM

6) Click on Roles

7) Click Search for Application in Role Menu

😎 In the Type of Menu Entry - Select Launch Pad Catalogue

9) Enter the Catalogue ID in the Catalogue Field

10) Execute

entry.title: How to change message "One selected object cannot be processed."
entry.content:
Hi. I have a Fiori application and a button in the toolbar. The availability of the button is controlled by status. If multiple lines are selected, a message appears: "One selected object cannot be processed.

Workbench dc692f36-ef96-4944-b903-3bd75716f462". How can I replace ID with WBS from the line?  I tried the annotation "@Common: {SemanticKey: [wbs]}" but it does not change. 

Thanks

entry.title: What is a Pacemaker Work center in capacity scheduling table/board?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I've been trying to understand how to use the capacity scheduling board and the capacity scheduling table apps in Fiori but I facing an issue. When I click the work center filter on the top, I find it empty whereas there are plenty of work centers in the system. So after doing some research and skimming through this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/did-you-know-this-about-capacity-planning-in-s-4hana/ba-p/13579456 , I've come across the word "Pacemaker work center" but I can't find a clear definition for what exactly is it and what differentiates it from a regular work center. It seems that these apps only show a Pacemaker work center.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: IBP KF calculation - How to bring calculated values to current bucket if it lies in past week
entry.content: Add a Helper KF - Leadtime Negative for calculating negative value. Then use formula for KF1 as IBP_PERIODSHIFT("ZTMPDUMMYKF2@WKPRODLOC","LEADTIMENEGATIVE@WKPRODLOC",''SUM'')

entry.title: Not able to enhance the DETAIL view in Solution Quotation. BTCustomerH is non editable.
entry.content: I am not able to enhance the DETAIL view in Solution Quotation as it was generated by SAP when we added custom fields in CFL. SAP has generated standard class for BTCustomerH, Even if i don't enhance it is not allowing me to generate V and P methods of attribute(created using CFL). I need to change the look from F4 to drop down for Solution Quotations in BRIM. What is the workaround for this.

Sayuj

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Capacity Requirement planning in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: For those who have an issue with work centers not showing despite setting them as production line in production version, I managed to solve the same issue by assigning "Plant and MRP controller" to my Area of Responsibility in application settings.

entry.title: Re: Modifying the default texts of mail in SEN
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

It is possible to modify some of the standard email messages that are sent by Manager but I don't think that it can be done for that specific message.  To modify the email message templates in the Cloud version:

1. Open Manager
2. Navigate to the System Workarea
3. Start editing the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Mail object
4. Click on the Assets tab and then click the Show Streams button.  You should see this:

 5. Click on the hyperlink (the name) beside one of the messages and you will see the structure of the template used for the corresponding message
6. If you right click that structure and choose View Source, you will see the HTML that makes up that template
7. If you modify that template text and reload it using the Replace File link, you can change the corresponding message.  You can use HTML to format the text in the modified template
8. After reloading a template, finish editing and publish the Mail object

I tested all the templates and none appear to be the one used for the new user message.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Can we apply heading style and body text in SAP Enabl...
entry.content:
Hi there,

Every Simulation bubble is based on a bubble style.  There are two parts to each bubble style so you must have editing control of both to make the changes.  To change the formatting of the text that appears in Simulation bubbles you will need to:

1. Open Producer
2. Navigate to the Resources > Adaptable Resources section and start editing the bubble style object that you want to modify, e.g. Big Title Bar Blue

3. Navigate to the Resources > Bubble Styles area and start modifying the corresponding version of the same bubble style object
4. After you have editing control of both objects, double click one to open it
5. Open the Title Text area of settings
6. Apply your styling details
7. Open the Content Text area of settings
8. Apply your styling details
9. Save the change and close the Style Editor window
10. Finish editing and publish both bubble style objects

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Um Evento que Encheu os Olhos da Comunidade SAP em Recife #SITREC2024

entry.title: How to incorporate Hourly employees into Compensation Module?
entry.content:
We would like to have the Hourly employees in the United States incorporated into compensation module so that their bonus and salary increase process can be handled through the system. Additionally, we would like to automatically generate documents related to the module.

We are currently exploring the features and opportunities offered by the compensation templates.

How can we achieve this?

entry.title: CONTACT BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE FOR BITCOIN AND ETHEREUM RECOVERY
entry.content:
I am compelled to share my remarkable experience with BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, a team of exceptional bitcoin recovery experts who have been a beacon of hope in the darkest of times. As an avid investor in the cryptocurrency market, I had the misfortune of falling prey to a sophisticated phishing scam that left me with a depleted wallet and a shattered sense of security.

The incident occurred when I received an email that appeared to be from a reputable cryptocurrency exchange, requesting me to update my account information. Unbeknownst to me, the email was a cleverly crafted trap designed to steal my sensitive information. Before I knew it, my bitcoin wallet had been drained of its entire contents.

Devastated and feeling utterly helpless, I began to search for a solution online. That's when I stumbled upon BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, a company that claimed to specialize in bitcoin recovery services. I was skeptical at first, but after reading numerous positive reviews and testimonials from satisfied clients, I decided to take a chance.

From the moment I contacted BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, I was treated with professionalism and empathy. Their team of experts, led by a brilliant and seasoned cryptocurrency forensic analyst, listened attentively to my situation and assured me that they would do everything in their power to recover my stolen bitcoins.

The recovery process was a complex and intricate one, involving a thorough analysis of the phishing scam's digital footprint and a series of sophisticated cryptographic techniques. Throughout the process, the BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE team kept me informed of their progress, providing regular updates and insights into their methodology.

To my absolute delight, BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE was able to successfully recover 95% of my stolen bitcoins, a feat that I thought was impossible. The relief and joy I felt upon receiving the news was indescribable.

I am deeply grateful to BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE for their incredible expertise, dedication, and commitment to justice. Their unwavering determination to combat cryptocurrency fraud and protect innocent victims like myself is truly admirable. I highly recommend their services to anyone who has fallen victim to bitcoin theft or fraud.

In conclusion, BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE is more than just a bitcoin recovery service – they are a symbol of hope and a beacon of light in the dark world of cryptocurrency fraud. Their exceptional expertise, professionalism, and unwavering commitment to their clients make them the go-to solution for anyone seeking to recover their stolen bitcoins.

If you or someone you know has been a victim of bitcoin theft or fraud, do not hesitate to contact BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE. They will work tirelessly to recover your stolen assets and bring the perpetrators to justice.

Contact Information:
Email: blockchaincyberretrieve001@zohomail.com
Whatsapp:+15205648300
Website: https://blockchaincyberretrieve.com

entry.title: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Dear all

I would like to download last patch form SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.0 , PATCH 9, HOTFIX 1, but just the patch, to update our server and update all Clients customers.

Can you help me to find this update? Not all SAP GUI packet

 

thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Hello customer,

Thank you for reaching out to SAP.

The step-by-step to find the latest patch level available for SAP GUI for Windows can be found in the  KBA 2283851  - Tutorial "Where can I get a SAP Frontend patches?" 

The latest SAP GUI version and patch can be downloaded from the SAP Support Portal:

Software Center - SAP for Me

# "Installations & Upgrades"

 # "By Category"

  # "SAP Frontend Components"

   # "SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS"

    # "SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.00 CORE "

     # "Support Packages and Patches"

        # SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 PL09 (Note 1053737) --> Select either 32 bit or 64 bit recommendation. To know more about functional differences between 32 and 64 bit version, check SAP Note 3218166.

 

Best regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: MOG
entry.content:
Hi all,

Does anyone have idea on the SAP journals after a MOG?

Do we move assets and liabilities, expenses and income and adjust through equity.

Please assist.

Thank you.

entry.title: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

After updating SAP UI5 to version 1.120.21 ( error also occurs on version 1.120.0 & 1.120.18 ) on our S/4HANA 2023 on-premise system (SAP_BASIS 758, SAP_UI 758), I’ve encountered a random error while resolving the promise of sap.ui.core.Component.create.

Upon deeper investigation, the error seems to originate from sap/ui/fl/apply/_internal/flexState/FlexState.js, specifically in the executeFunction of DataSelector. It appears that one of my components is occasionally missing the runtimePersistence object, which results in the error. This issue occurs inconsistently across multiple components.

I’ve reviewed the version change logs but couldn’t find anything that addresses this specific issue. One of the closest note I could find was : https://me.sap.com/notes/3506053/E (I suspected it was an ui5 version issue and updated my version to 1.120.21 but the error still occurs ). Has anyone else faced a similar problem after the update or found a solution?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to display keys in dropdown list in Fiori
entry.content:
Users are using FB70 in Fiori, in SAPGUI for Windows, the key is displayed in dropdown list but it is missing in Fiori

Please share the setting where to show keys in Fiori


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to display keys in dropdown list in Fiori
entry.content: Please refer to KBA ##2723816 - WEBGUI: How to show keys in dropdown/combobox elements

entry.title: UIGEF001 maps in S4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are upgrading from S4HANA 1909 to 2023. Currently using UIGEF001 maps but the GEF components are not loading in gef_map_uiv2 app. We learnt that we need to use UIS4HOP1 maps from 2021. But since we have extended the UIGEF001 maps, is there any way to make UIGEF001 maps(UI5 app gef_map_uiv2 app) work in S4HANA 2023.

Thanks.

entry.title: cannot get document details in SAP Business One mobile
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are encountering an intermittent issue when trying to open Sales Orders in SAP B1 mobile. Sometimes it works fine, but occasionally we receive the error below.

Has anyone experienced this before, or can you provide any insights into what might be causing it?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point to get the data TYPE you need in ABAP?
entry.content: Actually instead of XSD I should probably say WSDL.

entry.title: Re: Service Layer with return error code 408
entry.content: Thank you so much, we'd solved the issues by improve our interface codes.
